Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dorothy Chow-Losinski & Damian Rickert for (petitioner) Dora Nelly Benevides.

The Court stated that the examiner has sent notes but that there has been no response. Mr. Rickert stated that they are working on the accounting, that they have addressed the issues with the exception of the cemetery plots, that they need to be sold, that they expect the sale will take 2-4 weeks at which time they will file an amended petition and confirmed that they sent notice out but did not file the proof of service. The Court instructed them to file the proof of service. The accounting petition was continued to February 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and counsel was instructed to stay in touch with the examiner.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Siu. (Not Reported)
